description:
In May 2026, Sundar Pichai announced Google's "Agentic Era," showcasing a 7x growth in "llm tokens" usage to 3.2 quadrillion monthly. This "ai news" also introduced "Gemini Spark," a personal agent, and advancements like Gemini 3.5 Flash and TPU 8 chips, highlighting the rapid pace of "ai technology" development from "google labs" and the "future ai" holds with new "ai agents" and applications like audio glasses.

----

----

What ships today vs. what's coming this summer:

• Gemini Spark — your personal AI agent inside the Gemini app. Runs 24/7 on a dedicated Google Cloud VM. Beta opens next week for AI Ultra subscribers in the US.
• Antigravity 2.0 — desktop hub for every agent. Optimized Flash inside runs 12x faster than other frontier models.
• Gemini 3.5 Flash — beats 3.1 Pro across almost every benchmark. 4x faster output. Less than half the price.
• Gemini Omni Flash — generates output in any modality, video first. Shipping today in the Gemini app, Google Flow, and YouTube Shorts.
• TPU 8t (training) + TPU 8i (inference) — 3x raw compute, 2x energy efficiency, Pathways scales across 1M+ TPUs.
• Search agents — generative UI ships free in Search this summer. 24/7 personalized info agents for AI Pro/Ultra.
• Google Pics, audio glasses (fall 2026), Gemini for Science, Daily Brief, Docs voice mode.

The receipts that justify the headline:
• 9.7 trillion tokens/month (May 2024) → 480 trillion (May 2025) → 3.2 quadrillion (May 2026). 7x year-over-year.
• Gemini app: 900M monthly users. Double last year.
• 8.5 million developers on Google models. 13 products at 1B+ users each.
• Google's 2026 capex: $180B on infrastructure.

📌 Source — Sundar Pichai's keynote post:
https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/sundar-pichai-io-2026/

So — what's your favorite announcement from this keynote? Pick one and drop it in the comments.

fulltitle: Google I/O 2026  - The Agentic Era Started Without You Knowing #GoogleIO #AIagents
